title: Jungle Fight 3

infobox.value: [Jungle Fight 2](#Jungle_Fight_2) | May 15, 2004 | Studio 5 Festival Mall Manaus | [Manaus](/wiki/Manaus "Manaus"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")

is the second year in the history of [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight"), a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") promotion based in Brazil. In 2004 Jungle Fight held 2 events beginning with, *Jungle Fight 2*.

["Jungle Fight 2"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-2-Jungle-Fight-2-2311). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20141009181448/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-2-Jungle-Fight-2-2311) from the original on October 9, 2014.

["Jungle Fight 3"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-3-Jungle-Fight-3-2629). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20141009181458/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-3-Jungle-Fight-3-2629) from the original on October 9, 2014.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Jungle Fight 3](/w/index.php?title=Jungle_Fight_3&redirect=no "Jungle Fight 3"))

| Chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | [2003 in Jungle Fight](/wiki/2003_in_Jungle_Fight "2003 in Jungle Fight") | 2004 in Jungle Fight | [2005 in Jungle Fight](/wiki/2005_in_Jungle_Fight "2005 in Jungle Fight") | | |

The year **2004** is the second year in the history of [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight"), a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") promotion based in Brazil. In 2004 Jungle Fight held 2 events beginning with, *Jungle Fight 2*.

## Events list

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2004_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Events list")]

Main article: [Jungle Fight § Events](/wiki/Jungle_Fight#Events "Jungle Fight")

| # | Event Title | Date | Arena | Location |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 3 | [Jungle Fight 3](#Jungle_Fight_3) | October 23, 2004 | Tropical Hotel | [Manaus](/wiki/Manaus "Manaus"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |
| 2 | [Jungle Fight 2](#Jungle_Fight_2) | May 15, 2004 | Studio 5 Festival Mall Manaus | [Manaus](/wiki/Manaus "Manaus"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |

## Jungle Fight 2

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2004_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Jungle Fight 2")]

Jungle Fight 2[[1]](#cite_note-1) was an event held on May 15, 2004 at The Tropical Hotel in [Manaus](/wiki/Manaus "Manaus"), [Amazonas](/wiki/Amazonas_(Brazilian_state) "Amazonas (Brazilian state)"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil").

## Jungle Fight 3

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2004_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Jungle Fight 3")]

Jungle Fight 3[[2]](#cite_note-2) was an event held on October 23, 2004 at The Tropical Hotel in [Manaus](/wiki/Manaus "Manaus"), [Amazonas](/wiki/Amazonas_(Brazilian_state) "Amazonas (Brazilian state)"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil").
